query:
SELECT 'news_items' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM news_items
UNION ALL
SELECT 'research_reports', COUNT(*) FROM research_reports
UNION ALL
SELECT 'daily_editorial', COUNT(*) FROM daily_editorial
UNION ALL
SELECT 'startup_of_day', COUNT(*) FROM startup_of_day
UNION ALL
SELECT 'breaking_news', COUNT(*) FROM breaking_news;
